description_long: This is a freestanding bulletin board with a sturdy, rectangular metal frame supporting a large, yellow display panel. The display panel features a printed floor plan and text in Russian, indicating it is used for informational or directional purposes, likely in a public or semi-public building. The frame consists of two vertical posts with wide, flat feet for stability, and a horizontal bar at the top and bottom for structural support. The display panel is slightly recessed within the frame, protected by a transparent cover, likely acrylic or glass, to shield the information from weather or tampering. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for high-traffic areas. The design is functional and utilitarian, prioritizing visibility and durability.
description: A freestanding metal-framed bulletin board with a yellow informational display panel, protected by a transparent cover. It features a floor plan and text, designed for public or semi-public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow display panel with a floor plan and text, framed by a black metal structure with two wide feet.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the display panel and the depth of the frame, with the panel slightly angled within the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black backing of the bulletin board and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slimness of the display and the supporting frame.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular tubular metal frame with two vertical posts, horizontal top and bottom bars, and wide flat feet for stability.
